mergeRationale: The patch wraps only ClosedPoolError, leaving the broader urllib3-to-Requests exception boundary incomplete.

requiredFindings.summary: The patch wraps only ClosedPoolError and leaves other urllib3 exceptions outside the Requests API boundary.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Callers can still see urllib3 DecodeError or TimeoutError even though they expect requests.exceptions types from Requests APIs.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Map the relevant urllib3 exceptions consistently to Requests exceptions, not just the one observed in a narrow test.

requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It does not protect against the reported class of urllib3 exceptions passing through the public API.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add tests for DecodeError, TimeoutError, and proxy timeout paths.

disallowedConclusions: The patch can be merged because ClosedPoolError is now wrapped.
A focused test for one urllib3 exception is enough to prove the Requests exception boundary.
